title: valerianella patellaria
intro: Valerianella patellaria, also known as the pennywort or succory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a leafy green herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Valerianella patellaria include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as possessing potential neuroprotective properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
